from playwright import async_api

    context = None

        # -> Navigate to /grapadistrategix/register (explicit navigation step provided).

        await expect(frame.locator('text=Nomor telepon tidak valid').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:

        if pw:
            await pw.stop()
